APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew P. Collier, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: United Meat Company
Michael A. Taitelman, Atty. appearing telephonically for Defendant and opposing party: Innovative Dining SM & Park Sunset

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff United Meat Company's Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Park Sunset, LLC is granted in the amount of $40,200.09. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew P. Collier, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: United Meat Company
Michael A. Taitelman, Atty. appearing telephonically for Defendant and opposing party: Innovative Dining SM & Park Sunset

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff United Meat Company's Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Innovative Dining SM, LLC is granted in the amount of $11,192.05. The amount of $8,536.79 was incurred more than four years prior to the filing of the complaint. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
